purpose: Governed registry for OpenClaw skill identity, lifecycle status, alias normalization, and staged migration. Informational only; not wired into runtime loading.

field_notes.id: Stable registry key. Prefer lowercase kebab-case. Must remain stable across path moves.
field_notes.canonical_name: Human-facing primary skill name; usually aligned with SKILL frontmatter name or skill.json name.
field_notes.owner_runtime: Which runtime domain is the long-term owner of the skill contract: brain | body | hybrid | system | unknown.
field_notes.skill_class: Functional class used for governance and migration: memory | orchestration | automation | integration | productivity | monitoring | development | research | knowledge | multimodal.
field_notes.layer_affinity: Execution/data boundary: Brain | Body | Hybrid. Brain = cognition/policy/memory; Body = local IO/device/API actuation; Hybrid = both.
field_notes.source_path: Current authoritative source directory discovered in the live skill inventory.
field_notes.mirror_path: Secondary mirrored location if dual-published or expected migration destination; null when not yet defined.
field_notes.status: Governance lifecycle status, not runtime health. Allowed draft set: active | candidate-migrate | dual-track | frozen | deprecated | disabled | experimental.
field_notes.compat_mode: Compatibility behavior during migration: native-only | shim-skill-json | shim-skill-md | dual-read | dual-publish | redirect-only | none.
field_notes.rollback_target: Path or registry id to restore if migration/regression occurs; null if not planned yet.
field_notes.acceptance_checks: Minimal checks that must pass before status promotion or path cutover.
field_notes.display_name: Presentation-facing label. May preserve branding, casing, Chinese/English mixed names, or subtitles.
field_notes.aliases: Legacy names, directory names, published slugs, casing variants, and historical identifiers. Never use aliases as canonical identity if canonical_name is known.
field_notes.directory_name: Actual on-disk directory basename for the current source_path.
field_notes.source_origin: Discovery origin of the authoritative path: workspace | user | system | extension.
field_notes.manifest_types: Manifest/files that define the skill shape today, e.g. SKILL.md, skill.json, package.json. This is descriptive, not a loader contract.

acceptance_checks: design guidance stays descriptive, not directly side-effectful
workflow outputs remain compatible with downstream execution tools
migration does not force a runtime loader rewrite
entries.notes: Hybrid planning/execution boundary skill.

acceptance_checks: do not scan as a callable skill
delete or relocate once ownership is known
if revived, create standard skill structure before status change

acceptance_checks: CLI publish/install/update flows remain documented
registry does not become the package manager of record prematurely
version source-of-truth remains explicit
entries.notes: Meta-skill that itself governs skills; keep ownership with system until governance stabilizes.

mouse/keyboard/screenshot action names remain backward compatible
